Added semantic_catalog_settings migration storing embedding_dimension=384, wired decision-engine defaults/readiness to check the DB setting, added explicit semantic repository validation for seed/search embedding length mismatch, set compose nlp-service EMBEDDING_DIMENSION=384 explicitly, and updated manual Qwen docs to 384. Implemented explainable hybrid matcher policy. Replaced fixed max+0.08 merge with weighted semantic+lexical agreement policy, added score_components/matched_sources metadata, added identifier-aware lexical boost for lookup phrases, switched quick semantic gate to an in-process hybrid harness (deterministic local embeddings plus in-memory semantic search) so corpus metrics exercise hybrid ranking without external services, and added deterministic ordering / identifier boost tests. Verification: go test -count=1 ./internal/app/decision PASS; go run ./cmd/semantic-gate PASS with top1 151/207 (up from 148/207 after data pass and from 91/207 original baseline), top3 176/207, clarify 200/207, operator 203/207; git diff --check PASS.

Implemented contextual dialogue semantics in decision service: identifier-only follow-ups for pending business lookups, yes/no handling for pending states, short active-topic follow-ups via contextual signal tables, and guard so confident global topic switches still win. Added unit tests for identifier follow-up, workspace price follow-up, payment status follow-up, yes/no pending responses, and topic switch preservation. Verification: go test -count=1 ./internal/app/decision PASS; go run ./cmd/semantic-gate PASS with top1 152/207, top3 174/207, clarify 201/207, operator 203/207.

Implemented knowledge retrieval enrichment path for knowledge intents. Added repository wrapper for knowledge chunk search, service-level retrieval tests, and fixed goose migration annotations for semantic catalog dimension guard. Verification: go test -count=1 ./internal/app/decision ./internal/app ./internal/infrastructure/repository/postgres PASS; go run ./cmd/semantic-gate PASS; targeted e2e smoke subset PASS with E2E-003, E2E-005, E2E-009, E2E-009b, E2E-009c, E2E-038 via E2E_MOCK_EXTERNAL_PORT=18190 E2E_KEEP_COMPOSE=1 npx playwright test --config tests/e2e/playwright.config.ts --grep 'E2E-003|E2E-005|E2E-009|E2E-038'.

Accepted for current release under codified semantic thresholds. booking_not_found without lookup evidence remains intentionally unsupported; current behavior clarifies instead of claiming a missing booking without identifier proof.
